why: The catalog editor's Edit mode doesn't faithfully round-trip product data — fields get overwritten, reset, or stuck after save/reload, making the editor unreliable for revising existing products.

intended_outcome.statement: Fix the 3 confirmed data-field bugs so Edit mode is a faithful editor of what Add/Save-as-Draft produces: brand/collection selectors sync on product switch, auto-derivation respects existing edits in Edit mode, and bag taxonomy fields are editable rather than read-only.
